ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the client's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_applications" (
  "web_app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web application */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the web application */,
  "web_app_name" TEXT /* Name of the web application */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the web application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the web application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the web application was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the web application's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the web application is active */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the web application */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format for the web application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("web_app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_applications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_applications_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_applications_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "web_app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the web application that the metric belongs to */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "trans" INTEGER /* Number of transactions */,
  "elap_time" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds */,
  "data_trans" INTEGER /* Amount of data transferred */,
  "resp_time" REAL /* Response time in seconds */,
  "trans_rate" REAL /* Transaction rate */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput */,
  "concurrent" REAL /* Number of concurrent requests */,
  "okay" INTEGER /* Number of successful requests */,
  "failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed requests */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the metric was recorded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the web application */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_web_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("web_app_id") REFERENCES web_applications ("web_app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is active */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, log file) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of data format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data format was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data format's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data format is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)
